source_policy: Official Album Surf model pages and the current governed canonical profiles are the authority. Public family reflects manufacturer design intent. Board DNA describes behaviour but does not determine identity.

models.manufacturer_intent: Alternative performance board combining modern shortboard performance with added paddle and speed.
models.editorial_reason: Narrow outline, performance rocker and critical surfing intent make this a performance shortboard, not a fish.

models.manufacturer_intent: Versatile shape that can be ridden short in small surf or at normal shortboard dimensions as a daily driver.
models.editorial_reason: Everyday versatility is the explicit core role.

models.manufacturer_intent: Fish-derived step-down with easy speed, flow and more aggressive rail-to-rail performance.
models.editorial_reason: Album explicitly describes fish speed and flow with added performance capability.

models.manufacturer_intent: Stretched fish concept with easy paddle and speed, refined for larger and better waves.
models.editorial_reason: Fish identity remains primary despite greater range and length.

models.manufacturer_intent: High-performance asymmetrical design for technical surfing in quality waves.
models.editorial_reason: Performance rocker, refined rails and critical surfing purpose clearly place it in Performance Shortboards.

models.manufacturer_intent: Classic fish converted to an asymmetrical design with greater hold and control.
models.editorial_reason: Album explicitly anchors the design in classic fish identity.

models.manufacturer_intent: Performance shortboard balancing critical surfing with alternative design influence.
models.editorial_reason: Critical surfing and performance intent remain primary.

models.manufacturer_intent: Modern performance board with relaxed entry, added exit rocker and critical-wave capability.
models.editorial_reason: Technical, sensitive, quality-wave shortboard by design.

models.manufacturer_intent: Daily-driver fish that retains fish speed and flow while adding tighter-pocket performance.
models.editorial_reason: Album explicitly calls it a performance fish; daily-driver language describes range, not family identity.

models.manufacturer_intent: Dynamic mid-length developed from a stretched fish platform, with added hold and better-wave range.
models.editorial_reason: Album leads with mid-length identity and sizing, while fish DNA remains a secondary design influence.

models.manufacturer_intent: Flat, fast fish combining paddle and planing with stronger performance.
models.editorial_reason: Fish identity is explicit and central.

models.manufacturer_intent: Performance-oriented shortboard with asymmetrical advantages and high-performance capability.
models.editorial_reason: Album explicitly describes a high-performance shortboard.

models.manufacturer_intent: Refined classic Southern California fish focused on trim, speed and fluid carves.
models.editorial_reason: Album calls it the purest classic fish in the range.

models.manufacturer_intent: All-round mid-length balancing glide, flow and surprising performance.
models.editorial_reason: Longer rail line, glide and mid-length role are primary.

models.manufacturer_intent: Hybrid mid-length and step-up with egg-like paddle, broad range and performance in stronger waves.
models.editorial_reason: Mid-length identity and sizing are primary; step-up capability is a secondary role rather than the public family.

models.manufacturer_intent: Shortboard-level performance with twin-fin speed, pivot and drive without traditional twin limitations.
models.editorial_reason: Album explicitly compares it with shortboard performance and removes traditional twin limitations.

models.manufacturer_intent: Traditional high-performance thruster outline with Album speed, flow and hidden foam.
Performance fish with classic fish outline, modern rails and additional speed and grip.
models.editorial_reason: Manufacturer explicitly identifies it as a performance fish.

models.manufacturer_intent: Performance twin using a modern shortboard rocker, refined rails and quality-wave control.
models.editorial_reason: Narrow outline, performance rocker and quality-wave intent make it a Performance Shortboard rather than Fish.
